Our Story

Crafting Excellence
in Every Thread

Welcome to PN Creation — A trusted name for premium Aari embroidery. Located at Pandori Warraich on Majitha Road, we combine the beauty of traditional embroidery with the precision of modern automatic machines.

Whether it's intricate designs, elegant colors, or bulk wholesale orders — We deliver consistent, uncompromising quality trusted by clients across markets.

Automatic Machine Embroidery
Custom Design Creation
Bulk & Wholesale Orders
Fast Turnaround Time
Premium Thread Quality
All Fabric Types Supported
What We Offer

Our Services

Bulk Wholesale Production & Precision Embroidery — Crafted to Global Standards.

We specialize in large-scale manufacturing of premium embroidered garments and high-precision Aari embroidery job work using advanced automated technology. With strict quality control, scalable production capacity, and reliable on-time delivery, we serve wholesalers, fashion brands, retailers, and export houses worldwide.

📦

Custom Design Work

Bespoke Aari embroidery design services tailored to your brand with precision, innovation, and export-quality craftsmanship.

Custom Pricing
📦

Bulk / Wholesale Orders

Scalable bulk production of premium embroidered ladies wear with competitive wholesale pricing and global supply capability.

Special Rates Available
📦

Embroidery Job Work Services

High-precision Aari embroidery job work solutions delivering consistent quality, fast turnaround, and large-scale production support.

Reliable Production Partner
